description_long: This is a black Xbox game controller with a robust, ergonomic design, featuring two analog sticks, a directional pad, and a set of colored action buttons (yellow, red, blue, green) on the right. The center of the controller displays a prominent green Xbox logo, flanked by 'Back' and 'Start' buttons. The surface is mostly matte black plastic, with textured grips for comfortable handling. On the top, there are two shoulder buttons, and the rear side is contoured for hand support. The controller is compact and designed for handheld use, with all controls easily accessible for gaming.
description: A black Xbox game controller with colored buttons, dual analog sticks, and a central Xbox logo, designed for ergonomic handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Xbox logo, colored action buttons, analog sticks, and control buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the controller's thickness and the protruding analog sticks and buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured hand grips and shoulder buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the controller and the arrangement of the buttons and sticks.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, analog sticks, directional pad
